project_identity.name: Neo-Telugu Calendar Extension
project_identity.core_concept: A cinematic, weather-reactive chrome new tab dashboard that blends ancient Telugu astrological precision (Panchangam) with high-end, glass-morphic modern UI.
project_identity.vibe: Sacred, precise, atmospheric, premium. No 'AI slop' gradients or generic tech templates.
project_identity.target_platform: Chrome Extension New Tab (1920x1080 desktop primary, static HTML/CSS/Vanilla JS)

rules.headings: Left-aligned, tracking-tighter (-0.02em) for large text. Use font-weight 300 (Light) for massive clocks, 600 (SemiBold) for section titles.
rules.telugu_text: Always use Noto Sans Telugu. Increase line-height to 1.6 to accommodate complex script rendering. Never italicize Telugu glyphs.
rules.overlines: Uppercase, wide tracking (0.2em), small size. Used for Tithi/Yogam labels.

ambient_weather_system.concept: The `<body/>` background is a live CSS/Canvas representation of outside weather + time of day. Cards sit on top in glassmorphism.

states.sunny_morning: Soft saffron/peach radial gradient. CSS sun-flare overlay.
states.clear_night: Deep indigo to obsidian linear gradient. Animated CSS box-shadow starfield. Moon phase matched to actual Tithi.
states.cloudy: Slow-drifting semi-transparent white/grey CSS blobs with blur filters.
states.rainy: Dark moody slate gradient. Slanted CSS line animations falling continuously.
states.eclipse_active: Surreal crimson/black backdrop glow overlaying the standard state.

ambient_weather_system.transitions: State changes must use a 3s ease-in-out crossfade to avoid jarring flashes.

layout_and_spacing.container: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 280px 1fr 340px; gap: 2rem; padding: 2rem; height: 100vh; max-width: 1920px; margin: 0 auto; box-sizing: border-box;

hero_dashboard.description: Massive cinematic clock and dynamic date. Sun-path arc tracks current time.
elements: Live clock (HH:MM:SS) in Cormorant Garamond Light
Weather Widget with minimalist SVG icon
Sun/Moon Path Arc: SVG curved dashed line with a glowing dot positioned via JS based on time.

panchangam_quad.description: Bento-style 2x2 grid inside a single card displaying Tithi, Nakshatram, Yogam, Karanam.
panchangam_quad.layout: CSS Grid 2x2. gap: 1rem. 1px solid inner borders separating quadrants.
panchangam_quad.typography: Overline (English label) + Body Large (Telugu Value) + Caption (End time).

timeline_auspicious.layout: Horizontal flex container, relative positioning for blocks.
timeline_auspicious.styling: Rahu Kalam/Yama Gandam = Red blocks. Abhijit Muhurtham = Green blocks. Current time = glowing vertical line absolute positioned.

monthly_calendar.layout: Grid 7 cols. Day headers (Sun-Sat in Telugu).
monthly_calendar.cell_design: Relative block. Gregorian date top-left. Tithi bottom-right. Festival dots/chips.

states.selected: Gold ring with slight scale-up (transform: scale(1.05)).

sankalpam_scroll.description: Sacred scroll aesthetic for daily archana text.
sankalpam_scroll.styling: Background tinted warm-sand (day) or muted-gold (night). Inner dotted border mimicking leaf manuscripts. Decorative Telugu Om (ఓం) watermark in background.
sankalpam_scroll.typography: Noto Sans Telugu, center-aligned, elegant leading.

horoscope_card.layout: Header with Rasi selector dropdown. Tabs for Health/Wealth/Career. Star rating system.

festival_eclipse_banner.styling: Eclipse: Blackout occluding circle animation + glowing red corona. Text: Danger/Auspicious styling.

card_stagger.concept: Cards fade in and drift slightly upward on load.
card_stagger.css: @keyframes cardEntrance { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

eclipse_pulse.concept: Glowing corona effect for eclipse days.
eclipse_pulse.css: @keyframes coronaPulse { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(213, 0, 0, 0.4); } 70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 20px rgba(213, 0, 0, 0); } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(213, 0, 0, 0); } }

birthday_celebration.concept: Falling flower petals (CSS particles) and avatar glow.

assets_and_motifs.kolam_rangoli: Use inline SVG lines with stroke-dasharray animations for borders. Avoid heavy PNGs. Example concept: continuous geometric line art fading at edges.
assets_and_motifs.decorative_dividers: Lotus or Mandala SVG vectors with low opacity (0.1) acting as `<hr/>` replacements.
assets_and_motifs.icons: Lucide icons (via unpkg/CDN) or feather icons. Keep stroke width thin (1.5px) for elegance.

requirements: Every interactive element MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Values must be kebab-case and role-based.
